name: Cross-tracker fallback modal accept
preconditions: Test runner must pass -PsimulateRuTrackerUnhealthy=true so the in-memory MirrorHealthRepository is seeded with all RuTracker mirrors UNHEALTHY before the @Test starts.

falsifiability_protocol.mutation_step: Mutate search() outcome dispatch so it never emits CrossTrackerFallbackProposed (always return Failure regardless of the cross-tracker fallback policy).
falsifiability_protocol.expected_failure: Modal never appears; assertion onNodeWithText('Try RuTor', substring) visible fails on 30s timeout.
falsifiability_protocol.expected_assertion_message_substring: Failed to assertWaitUntil: condition not met within 30000ms
falsifiability_protocol.revert_step: Restore the original outcome dispatch in LavaTrackerSdk.search().

operator_run_instructions: Capture screenshots: (a) modal with 'Try RuTor' button, (b) RuTor results banner after accept.
Perform falsifiability mutation, re-run, capture verbatim failure assertion, revert.
